Text.Main: Approaching the Tocado Garage
Approaching Exit to Highway 667 N - "Western Front"

- - - Tocado Studio Apartments - - -
You are carrying a Tocado Studio Apartment Key, would you like to enter your apartment, now?
- - - Tocado Studio Apartments - - -

[$emote]NOTE:  If you are in a convoy you will automatically join your convoy in whatever apartment they are currently in.  If you wish to enter your apartment specifically you may need to leave your current convoy.[$/emote]

- - - Tocado Studio Apartments - - -
You do not have an apartment key.  Someone with a Tocado Studio Apartment Key will have to open the door for you.
- - - Tocado Studio Apartments - - -

[$emote]To enter somoene else's apartment, group with the home owner and have that warrior transfer all grouped warriors when they enter the apartment.[$/emote]

- - - Tocado Studio Apartments - - -
Would you like to invite the rest of your convoy mates in Tocado to join you or do you wish to enter alone?

[$emote]If you invite your convoy mates you will enter your home immediately and they will join you if they accept the invitation.[$/emote]
- - - Tocado Studio Apartments - - -

- - - Tocado Studio Apartments - - -
You have been invited to join your convoy mates in a Tocado Studio Apartment, do you wish to go?
- - - Tocado Studio Apartments - - -

- - - Tocado Studio Apartments - - -
The Change has opened our mouths; through our actions we speak for our people, and guard the path that is the Way.
The Change has unbound our hands; with them, we build our future and mold the path that is the Way.
The Change has opened our eyes; with them, we see the promise of our people and watch their step on the path that is the Way.
The Change has opened our ears; with them, we hear the voices of our people and guide them along the path that is the Way.
We shall tread... we shall tread... we shall tread.
We hear you, Champion, and are sheltered by your actions.
We feel you, Shaman, and place our world in your hands.
We see you, Avenger, what you see, you see for all of us.
We speak to you, Archon, where you lead us, we shall tread.

Gather around and be silent.  I will tell the tale of the time before the Voice, before the Path that is the Way was shown to us.  Be attentive, Initiates, for this tale was told to me by our Lady Prime herself.
In the times before the Night of Fire, before the wars that gave us our names and set the tribes upon The Path that is The Way, we were born to an unsuspecting world.

In those days we were no different from man.  Like them we reveled in our arrogant grip upon the world, delighting as we choked away its life in our clenched fist.  In those dark times all were Man and Man ruled all.

The Change came upon us quietly.  Even those who would become the first of The Changed did not yet realize their destiny, the destiny brought to them when the sky rained stars upon the world.  The first of us were very much like Man, only the color of our flesh separated us, but it was enough.

To Man, our differences were plagues; The Change was an unfortunate affliction to be cured with their science.  To them we were helpless victims.  They did not understand The Change, or what it meant for us all.  They soon learned the truth, and their folly brought the time of troubles to us all in a Night of Fire.  But there is more to the tale that must be told before the Night that was Day.

Within a generation, the first children of The Changed began to show signs of their true destiny.  Man's pity for our "illness" was soon replaced by fear as our children walked the world with wondrous gifts, abilities denied to mere Men.  Men saw that The Change had left them behind and they knew the fear of their own extinction for the first time.

In his panic and fear, Man could not abide our early kin and the wondrous gifts given to them by the Land.  Simple kindnesses, even the right to educate our children, were denied us to, "protect the uninfected and preserve the pure."  Medical isolation provided a facade behind which their hatred of our kind could fester and grow.
The Changed were gathered into camps to "prevent the spread" of the plague they claimed we bore.  Subjugated and oppressed, our people withered in the ghettos Man had created.

Children of The Change with gifts that went unseen walked free but felt a burning rage in their hearts; Man rejected The Change and its children.  This treatment of the Changed could not go on; it would only end in pain for all.
And so did the first generation of the Changed learn of the hatred of Man.  Our ancestors suffered so that future generations could know the Change and be taken up by it.
Gather around and be silent.  I will speak to you now of the second generation of the Changed and the child Marta.  This a tale a woe, a tale of a time of terror for all the Changed.

The child Marta was among the first children of the 2nd Generation.  She was born in the 'quarantine' camps as were most of our kind in those dark days.  The names of her parents are lost to us now, but it matters not.  For not even Marta knew their names.

Marta's mother died in her birth, and her father was never allowed to see her.  The book of Jared describes the father's sorrow as ceaseless, and calls his death a mercy from the Land.  Marta knew none of this, for she taken by Men immediately after her birth.

For Marta was a special child.  Though she was Changed, she showed none of the familiar signs.  Her eyes held color and her skin was pink as any Human's.  This baffled their 'scientists' and they seized her for their tortuous experiments.  They were determined to understand what she was.

But the scientists were unable to explain the child Marta.  To them she appeared Human, yet she was born to the Changed.  Forsaken by the Change, they could not understand the gifts the Land had given her.
Frustrated, they cast the child Marta off, selling her as property to one of the many bands of fanatics that stalked the Land hunting our kind as animals.

The fanatics intended to use Marta.  As they travelled from town to town they would parade Marta in front of the ignorant humans.  To them she was a symbol of the danger the Changed posed - for she was Changed herself and yet did not look it!

When the crowds realized that Marta was Changed - a 'mutant' - they would cry out in rage and fear.  Pelting the small child with stones and shouting curses they would torment the child, to the joy of her captors.  But they did not know of Marta's gift.

Marta's gift are rare amongst our Kin; the Land had blessed her with the ability to hear the thoughts of man and Kin alike.  When the crowds would torment her she would writhe in the sea of their rage - drowning in the hatred burining in their minds.  Though only a child, Marta was strong.  Secretly she used her gifts to learn the secrets of Man.

Finally, when Marta was ready, she put her own thoughts into the minds of the crowd, tricking them into seeing her there, crying on the stage as she made her escape.  The child was finally free of the yoke of man!  Alas, her freedom would not last.

Now free, Marta wandered the streets of the town of Salem, looking for food and shelter.  As she walked the town, she encountered a band of Men.  Thieves and scoundrels, their intent to do the child harm was screaming in their minds, and it terrified the child.  She would not face capture and torment again; she could not!

As her would-be tormentors closed on her she defended herself in the only that she could.  She lashed out with her gifts, desparate to remain free and unharmed.  The child did not understand the power of her gifts and so was not prepared.

Marta's attackers were simply... extinguished, as if they were the flames of candles blowing the wind.  The poor child was as afraid of what had happen as she was of the fate her attackers had in mind!  Frightened and alone, she turned to the townsfolk for solace... but she would find none in their arms.

The townsfolk had seen what she done, and now knew she was Changed.  In their anger and fear of our race, they took the child and they killed her on the spot, dragging the body of that poor child behind their vehicle in triumph.

Her cries of pain, of sorrow, were so powerful that all the Changed alive that day heard them.  As one we rose up in anger.  The fate of that child was the fate that awaited us all if we were to do nothing!  Blood washed the streets of that town and no Man remained alive.  The war between our races had begun, with the death of a single child.

And so ends the tale of the child Marta.  The 2nd Generation of the Changed lived through horrible trials and great hardship.  Hunted as animals, they had no choice but to fight back or face extinction.  From that day forward we knew, The Children of the Change could not coexist with these Humans - they sought only our deaths.
What sort of item do you need?  I have salvaged armor, projectile weapons, and power plants -- all top quality, needing only minor repairs.
What type of kit do you need?  Working or salvaged?
